info.title: Supply Chain Monitor API
info.description: Supply Chain Monitor API. Live disruption alerts and country risk scores for supply chain monitoring. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Live disruption alerts and country risk scores for supply chain monitoring.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
